Search the web for the latest Rust 2025 edition changes and summarize

TOOL RESULT for search_web:
Title: Changes — Rust
URL: https://rust.facepunch.com/changes/
Snippet: The only aim in  Rust  is to survive. Everything wants you to die - the island's wildlife and other inhabitants, the environment, other survivors. Do whatever it takes to last another night.

Title: RUST 2025: Year in Review - Corrosion Hour
URL: https://www.corrosionhour.com/rust-2025-year-in-review/
Snippet: In this  RUST   2025 : Year in Review, you'll find our breakdown of the 50 most impactful  changes  introduced to  RUST  in  2025 , compiled from thousands of hours of hands-on play, testing, patch analysis, and community observation. Each entry highlights what changed, why it mattered, and where things ultimately landed.

Title: Understanding Rust 2025 Edition: Migration Guide and Performance ...
URL: https://markaicode.com/rust-2025-edition-migration-guide-performance-improvements/
Snippet: Learn how to migrate your code to  Rust   2025   Edition  and benefit from significant performance improvements, enhanced safety features, and better developer experience.

Title: Time to Pivot or Die! - Rustafied
URL: https://www.rustafied.com/updates/2025/11/5/time-to-pivot-or-die
Snippet: Blueprint Wipes With all the  changes  to progression this month, it's no surprise we're seeing a blueprint wipe alongside the update — the first forced BP wipe in quite some time. But that's not all: going forward, all official servers will now wipe blueprints on a monthly basis. This new system lines up with the existing monthly map wipe cadence and should help keep things fresh ...

Title: Dev Blog #35 — Rust Console Edition
URL: https://rust.double11.com/news/dev-blog-35
Snippet: Hello again Survivors, we hope you've had a wonderful first month of  2025 ! We're ready to add more features to your survival experience with the upcoming update. Read below to know what's in store for you! Stick around to the end of the Dev Blog for an Important Announcement.

Title: Rust 2025 Edition Preview: Language Evolution Explained - Medium
URL: https://medium.com/@backendbyeli/rust-2025-edition-preview-language-evolution-explained-da76cac5652b
Snippet: Explore  Rust   2025   Edition's  new features: improved async/await, better ergonomics, and seamless migration for backend developers building modern systems.

Title: Pivot Or Die - News — Rust
URL: https://rust.facepunch.com/news/pivot-or-die
Snippet: This month we bring you further progression  changes , performance improvements, mini fridge, box sorting, RPG skin and much more!

Title: Roadmap — Rust
URL: https://rust.facepunch.com/roadmap/
Snippet: This roadmap isn't a promise carved in stone, it's a direction of travel.  Rust  is a living, breathing game. Things  change . We'll respond to issues as they come up, react to community sentiment, and adjust priorities when it's the right call.

Title: Introduction - The Rust Edition Guide
URL: https://doc.rust-lang.org/edition-guide/
Snippet: Introduction Welcome to The  Rust   Edition  Guide! " Editions " are  Rust's  way of introducing  changes  into the language that would not otherwise be backwards compatible. In this guide, we'll discuss: What  editions  are Which  changes  are contained in each  edition  How to migrate your code from one  edition  to another

Title: 1.85.0 | Rust Changelogs - releases.rs
URL: https://releases.rs/docs/1.85.0/
Snippet: 1.85.0 # Released on: 20 February,  2025  Branched from master on: 3 January,  2025  Language # The 2024  Edition  is now stable. See the  edition  guide for more details. Stabilize async closures See RFC 3668 for more details. Stabilize #[diagnostic::do_not_recommend] Add unpredictable_function_pointer_comparisons lint to warn against function pointer comparisons Lint on combining #[no_mangle] and ...

<summary>Search results for "Rust 2025 edition changes" include multiple articles and resources.</summary>

1. **Corrosion Hour: RUST 2025: Year in Review**
   - Provides a comprehensive review of the most impactful changes introduced in Rust 2025.
   - Includes migration guides and performance improvements.

2. **Markaicode: Understanding Rust 2025 Edition: Migration Guide and Performance Improvements**
   - Offers guidance on migrating to Rust 2025 Edition and highlights significant performance enhancements.

3. **Rustafied: Time to Pivot or Die!**
   - Discusses progression changes, performance improvements, mini fridge, box sorting, RPG skins, and more.

4. **Medium: Rust 2025 Edition Preview: Language Evolution Explained**
   - Explains the new features of Rust 2025 Edition, including improved async/await, better ergonomics, and seamless migration for backend developers.

5. **Rust Roadmap**
   - Provides an overview of future developments in Rust, with a focus on language evolution and community feedback.

6. **Rust Changelog: 1.85.0**
   - Lists recent changes to Rust, including the stabilization of the 2024 Edition and improvements to async closures.

These resources cover a wide range of topics related to Rust 2025, from language evolution and migration guides to specific gameplay changes and performance enhancements.
